---
title: "Local-to-Global Mariculture Modelling"
subtitle: "Project Documentation - Index of files"
author: "Tormey Reimer"
date: today
---

# Table of Contents

All code and processes for this project are linked below. Note that some scripts require access to raw data which is not stored on Github. 

## Execution scripts

| Page | Description |
|---------|:-------------------------------------------------|
| **[Tidying data](docs-working/01_tidying_data.html)** | Initial data tidying and preparation |
| **[Extracting production locations](docs-working/02_extracting_production_locations.html)** | Identification of mariculture production site locations |
| **[Assessing species potential](docs-working/03_assessing_species_potential.html)** | Evaluation of species suitability for different locations |
| **[Extracting farm temperature data](docs-working/04_extracting_temperatures.html)** | SST data extraction and processing into a "typical year" for model inputs |
| **[Formulating experimental feeds](docs-working/05_formulating_feeds.html)** | Feed composition formulation for model runs |
| **[Assigning Production](docs-working/06_assigning production.html)** | Calculating typical harvest size per farm, assigning production and calculating population per farm to meet production data targets |
| **[How many runs per farm?](docs-working/07_how_many_runs_per_farm.html)** | Determining how many Monte-Carlo runs is enough for acceptable variation |
| **[Run Atlantic salmon model](docs-working/08_run_atlantic_salmon_model.html)** | Atlantic salmon growth model execution |

# Visualisation scripts

| Page | Description |
|---------|:-------------------------------------------------|
| **[Data exploration](docs-working/09_data_analysis_total_vals.html)** | Visualising the outputs of the Atlantic salmon growth model |
| **[Figures for manuscript](docs-working/10_figures_for_paper.html)** | Code used to generate the specific figures used in the manuscript |
